name: New Orleans Spicy Jambalaya #2
directions: In a large skillet, saute onion, green pepper, garlic and rice in butter until the onion is tender.
Stir in ketchup, water, vinegar, black pepper, hot red pepper sauce (or spice if using) tomato, ham Polish sausage.; stir to combine.
Cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until rice is tender.
Add in shrimp; simmer uncovered 5 minutes, or until shrimp turns pink, stirring occasionally.

name: Catfish Po' Boys With Spicy Cocktail Sauce
directions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
For spicy cocktail sauce combine wasabi powder and 1 teaspoon water, stirring to form a paste.  Combine ketchup, 2 teaspoons lemon juice, wasabi paste, and hot sauce in a small bowl; set aside.

Sprinkle Creole seasoning and 1/4 cup lemon juice over both sides of catfish.  Grill, covered with grill lid, over medium-high heat for 5 to 7 minutes on each side or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
Arrange 1 piece each of catfish, letuce, tomato, and onion evenly on bottom half of sandwich rolls.  Spread top halves with spicy cocktail sauce and serve immediately.

name: Gg's Crawfish Bisque
directions: Saute onions in butter.
Add all of the remaining ingredients to a crock pot and simmer several hours of blend flavors.

name: Pressed Chicken-Pesto Melt
directions: SUN-DRIED TOMATO PESTO.
Lightly pack the tomatoes into a 2 cup measuring up. Cover with very hot water until just immersed. Set aside.
Use a processor until the garlic cloves are chopped finely.
Remove the stems from the basil and add the leaves to the food processor. Pulse until no whole leaves remain.
Add the tomatoes and the liquid they soaked inches Process until smooth.
Add Parmesan cheese, vinegar, and oil. Process until smooth.
Preheat a panini-press up to 125°F.
cut the French bread into 8" lengths. Slice in half lengthwise. Spread the top with sun-dried tomato pesto and spread the bottom with mayonnaise and Creole mustard.
Layer the chicken breast on the bottom slice of bread. Top with sautéed onion and two slices of provolone cheese. Place top slice of bread.
Press for about 10 minutes, or until bread is golden and cheese is melted.

name: Muffuletta Dogs
directions: Stir together cauliflower, carrot, cheese, celery, roasted red bell peppers, Spanish olives, kalamata olives, parwley, and olive oil vinaigrette. Cover and chill 2 hours.
Grill 6 hot dogs according to package directions(or cook any way you like). Place dogs in buns, and top with cauliflower mixture.
Enjoy!
